case.title: ORDER OF RAILWAY CONDUCTORS & BRAKEMEN v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h4: ORDER OF RAILWAY CONDUCTORS & BRAKEMEN v. UNITED STATES, (1967)
ORDER OF RAILWAY CONDUCTORS AND BRAKEMEN ET AL. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF ILLINOIS. No. 1093. Decided June 12, 1967.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Marshall, Assistant Attorney General Turner, Howard E. Shapiro, Robert W. Ginnane and Betty Jo Christian for the United States et al., and Robert H. Bierma and David L. Wilson for appellee Pennsylvania Railroad Co.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
MR. JUSTICE BLACK is of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted and the case set for oral argument.
